attachHint: PDF, Word, images accepted. PDF: Vector reads up to 5 pages (1 file/day on Free). Other types not analyzed yet.
attachHintLegacy: PDF, Word, images accepted. Content not analyzed yet — Vector only sees the file name. Describe your task in text.
attachStoredOnly: Saved. Content not analyzed — add a description in your message.
filesOnlyPrompt: The client attached files without text. Content unavailable — names only. Ask them to describe the task briefly.
micModalBody: Tap the button below — the browser will ask for permission once.
micDenied:
To use voice, allow microphone access.

Click 🔒 near the address bar → Permissions → Microphone → Allow.
